title: Create: Resource Vents - Unofficial Fork
description: This is an unofficial fork of the create mod addon Create: Resource Vents.
body:
# Unofficial Fork
This project is an unofficial fork of the orginal project - Create: Resource Vents - [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-resource-vents) | [Github](https://github.com/Landscapes-Reimagined/CreateResourceVents).
For now, the goal is to add 1.21.1 Neoforge support which has been achieved and tested, might add more features in future! (maybe)

# Description
Create: Resource Vents is a reworking of Create: Molten Vents, made to be completely backwards compatible with Molten Vents, automatically upgrading any dormant or active Molten Vent already in the world, provided they are defined in the config.

Locating Resource Vents:
You can find resource vents strewn across the surface of the Overworld and more rarely in the Nether.

Activating Resource Vents:
To activate a Resource Vent, you must place a Superheating Blaze Burner above the Resource Vent, and it will activate after 10 seconds.

Technical implementation details can be found in the GitHub's Wiki page, which is currently a work in progress.
